H16_SOCCER::1193d4fd46d0963a1923.segment_definition: Identify every counter attack sequence. Segment starts when a team secures the ball and players immediately advance toward the opponent's half in transition. Segment ends when a shot is taken, the ball crosses the goal line for a goal, the ball is dispossessed, or the ball exits the field.
